author: Sam Bradley
title: Media Buying Briefing: Rival trade bodies emerge to contend programmatic’s future
description: Agentic media planning and buying could shake up programmatic media. But old politics and new ambitions are dividing key players into camps pursuing consensus – or disruption.
content: This Media Buying Briefing covers the latest in agency news and media buying for Digiday+ members and is distributed over email every Monday at 10 a.m. ET. More from the series →The introduction of a… [+9613 chars]
